positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a celestial forest scene viewed through abstract stained glass. The composition should feature strong, contrasting silhouettes of geometric trees and hidden moons, framed by vibrant jewel tones of deep sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and emerald green. The central subject is a winding river of light, evoking cosmic energy. The style must be a blend of Art Nouveau and Mid-Century Modern geometry, with clean lines, crisp edges, and high visual impact suitable for textile printing. Use negative space effectively to enhance the feeling of depth and mystery. High contrast, perfect symmetry, highly detailed.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, low contrast, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, jpeg artifacts
